units.lean_file_body:
open Matrix

variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K] {n : ℕ}

theorem det_of_triangular (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular id ∨ A.BlockTriangular (OrderDual.toDual : Fin n → Fin n)) :
    A.det = ∏ i : Fin n, A i i := by
  rcases h with (hU | hL)
  · exact Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular hU
  · exact Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular A hL
notes: Uses Mathlib's Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular and Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular with BlockTriangular condition.
The theorem combines both triangular cases via an or condition.
